Home › Orange County › Mills 50

Neighborhood · Orange County · Updated June 2026

Restaurants in Mills 50

26%Grade A
4.5Avg rating
19Restaurants

Not every kitchen in Mills 50 passes cleanly. Of the 19 we grade, 5 hold an A — but 4 sit at D or F. Some are popular anyway: ANH HONG RESTAURANT pulls 4.8 stars despite a D grade. The grades below cut through the reviews.
